header.title: RNN vs Transformer
header.subtitle: See tokenization, sequential LSTM processing, and transformer self-attention side by side.

input.title: Enter text
input.description: Type a sentence to tokenize and compare how an RNN (LSTM) and a Transformer process it.
input.placeholder: Try: The cat sat on the mat…

token.title: Tokenization
token.description: Watch BERT WordPiece split your sentence into subword tokens.

rnn.title: RNN (LSTM)
rnn.description: Untrained LSTM (64→128) processes one token at a time. Hidden state accumulates left-to-right.

transformer.title: Transformer
transformer.description: BERT self-attention (all layers, last layer shown). Brighter cells = stronger attention.

errors.emptyText: Please enter some text to analyze.
errors.backendFailed: Failed to reach the backend. Make sure the FastAPI server is running on port 8000.
